Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api

Interface Group

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable, TenantSpecificItem, UserManagementItem
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultGroup, LazyGroup
public interface Group extends TenantSpecificItem
This interface identifies a group in the saperion user administration.

      Returns:
      the users associated directly with this group.

    • getAllUsers

      Collection<User> getAllUsers(int depth)
      Gets all users associated with this group.

      Walks through the group of group tree upto the given depth and returns all users found in this tree without duplicates.

      Parameters:
      depth - of group tree search
      Returns:
      all users of group tree without duplicates
